name: solo-docs-page
title: Docs and sources
description: Documents, citations, lightweight forms, and long reference notes.

files.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://jami.studio/schemas/registry/suite-page-implementation.generated.json",

    "version": "2026-06-09.framework-neutral-component-factory",

    "runtimeReactRenderer": false,
    "hostedRuntime": false,
    "harnessRuntimeExecution": false,
    "executableActions": false,
    "radixWrapper": false
  },
  "page": {
    "id": "page.solo.docs",
    "title": "Docs and sources",
    "description": "Documents, citations, lightweight forms, and long reference notes.",
    "components": [
      "docs-source-panel",
      "text-field",
      "data-list",
      "panel"
    ]
  },
  "routes": [
    {
      "path": "/solo/docs",
      "page": "page.solo.docs",
      "title": "Docs and sources",
      "blocks": [
        "block.solo.docs-sources",
        "block.solo.forms"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "blocks": [
    {
      "id": "block.solo.docs-sources",
      "title": "Docs sources",
      "component": "docs-source-panel",
      "implementationFile": "studio-ui/suites/solo/blocks/solo-docs-sources-block.block.implementation.json",
      "renderedStates": [
        "ready",
        "long-content"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "block.solo.forms",
      "title": "Quick form",
      "component": "text-field",
      "implementationFile": "studio-ui/suites/solo/blocks/solo-forms-block.block.implementation.json",
      "renderedStates": [
        "ready",
        "invalid"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "components": [
    "data-list",
    "docs-source-panel",
    "panel",
    "text-field"
  ],
  "evidence": {
    "renderedBlockCount": 2,
    "responsiveLayout": "single-column-safe generated composition",
    "a11yStructure": "page routes compose labelled resident block implementations",
    "displayOnly": true
  },
  "runtime": {
    "runtimeReactRenderer": false,
    "hostedRuntime": false,
    "harnessRuntimeExecution": false,
    "executableActions": false,
    "radixWrapper": false
  },

  }
}

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Generated standalone page descriptor and primitive-factory implementation from the authored suite shell; full React page runtime remains pending.
